proven.claim: Proven: "--since" is documented in help (line 557) and consumed by
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 557
; Proven: "--since" is documented in help (line 557) and consumed by
; getFlag(args, "--since") in runDerive, which selects the git diff base ref.
(declare-const since_documented Int)
(declare-const since_consumed Int)
(assert (= since_documented 1))
; const ref = getFlag(args, "--since") || "HEAD"; used in diff.getChangedFilesSince(ref)
(assert (= since_consumed 1))
(assert (not (= since_documented since_consumed)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — --since is documented and selects the diff ref
